chapter_title: Department of the California Highway Patrol
text: The department shall obtain a vehicle suitable for registration and commercial safety inspections at border crossings into Mexico.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 2. Department of the California Highway Patrol [2100 - 2482]
#### Article 3. Powers and Duties [2400 - 2429.9]
##### § 2404.5

The department shall obtain a vehicle suitable for registration and commercial safety inspections at border crossings into Mexico.

*(Amended by Stats. 2016, Ch. 86, Sec. 299. (SB 1171) Effective January 1, 2017.)*

subsections.text: The department shall obtain a vehicle suitable for registration and commercial safety inspections at border crossings into Mexico.
